systemd_timers.name: systemd-tmpfiles-clean.timer
systemd_timers.timer_content:
[Unit]
Description=Daily Cleanup of Temporary Directories

[Timer]
OnCalendar=daily
Persistent=true

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target
systemd_timers.service_content:
[Unit]
Description=Cleanup of Temporary Directories

[Service]
Type=oneshot
ExecStart=/usr/bin/systemd-tmpfiles --clean

generated_timer_units.name: cron-root-backup.timer
generated_timer_units.timer_content:
[Unit]
Description=Converted from cron: root backup

[Timer]
OnCalendar=*-*-* 02:00:00
Persistent=true

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target
generated_timer_units.service_content:
[Unit]
Description=Converted from cron: root backup

[Service]
Type=oneshot
ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/backup.sh

generated_timer_units.name: cron-root-cleanup.timer
generated_timer_units.timer_content:
[Unit]
Description=Converted from cron: root cleanup

[Timer]
OnCalendar=Sun *-*-* 03:00:00
Persistent=true

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target
generated_timer_units.service_content:
[Unit]
Description=Converted from cron: root cleanup

[Service]
Type=oneshot
ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/cleanup.sh
